# App Settings V2

@dynatrace-sdk/client-app-settings-v2

## 1.1.3

### Patch Changes

- Update JSDoc examples. (APPDEV-13187)
- Update dependencies. (APPDEV-11813)

## 1.1.2

### Patch Changes

- Improve performance of date transformations. (APPDEV-12840)

## 1.1.1

### Patch Changes

- Improve performance of payload transformations. (APPDEV-12840)

## 1.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Support app-settings:objects:admin for resolveEffectivePermissions
- Added support for optional transformations. (APPDEV-11914)

### Patch Changes

- Added fix for 'transformToFormDataField' function. (APPDEV-12478)
- Remove generatedAt property from metadata file. (APPDEV-12696)

## 1.0.3

### Patch Changes

- Fix date-time format serialization. (APPDEV-11661)

## 1.0.2

### Patch Changes

- Corrected error response.

## 1.0.1

### Patch Changes

- Replace model transformations with single transformation function. (APPDEV-10818)
- Redundant error serializers are removed. (APPDEV-10272)

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- First major release

### Patch Changes

- Missing await added for API Gateway handler and line breaks at the end of the string are ignored. APPDEV-10883
- Imports reformatted and fixed incorrect type rendered for arrays of enum values. APPDEV-10701

## 0.3.1

### Patch Changes

- distinguish from v1 sdk

## 0.3.0

### Minor Changes

- add error object to settings objects response for incomplete responses.

## 0.2.0

### Minor Changes

- Enums are replaced with unions of literals. APPDEV-10338

## 0.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Inline enums as union of literals. APPDEV-9924

### Patch Changes

- Updated documentation for page-size
- Reexporting error classes from @dynatrace-sdk/shared-errors package.
- Add return types and improve usage examples inside JSDoc. APPDEV-7536
- Using common errors from @dynatrace-sdk/shared-errors package.
- Onboard app-settings v2
- - Add deprecated tags to generated models and fix descriptions for reference objects.
  - Improved default error handler to match the common error structure.
- Added deprecation of unused error classes. APPDEV-9613
- Added functionality for owner-based access
- include "context" to the resolveEffectivePermissions response
